en: Listen up We want some grub and our order better be just right okay Goldie and the Three

en: dog Gummies Only the red and the green And no bears please You got all that What

en: Will there be anything else That popcorn is too big
ko: 더 필요한 거 있어? 그 팝콘 너무 커.
